inputs.label: Density Value
inputs.businessContext: The numeric density value to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The numeric density value to convert.

inputs.label: From Unit (1=kg/m³, 2=g/cm³, 3=lb/ft³, 4=lb/in³)
inputs.businessContext: Code of the input density unit: 1 for kg/m³, 2 for g/cm³, 3 for lb/ft³, 4 for lb/in³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Code of the input density unit: 1 for kg/m³, 2 for g/cm³, 3 for lb/ft³, 4 for lb/in³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş yoğunluk biriminin kodu: 1 kg/m³, 2 g/cm³, 3 lb/ft³, 4 lb/in³.

inputs.label: To Unit (1=kg/m³, 2=g/cm³, 3=lb/ft³, 4=lb/in³)
inputs.businessContext: Code of the desired output density unit: 1 for kg/m³, 2 for g/cm³, 3 for lb/ft³, 4 for lb/in³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Code of the desired output density unit: 1 for kg/m³, 2 for g/cm³, 3 for lb/ft³, 4 for lb/in³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen çıkış yoğunluk biriminin kodu: 1 kg/m³, 2 g/cm³, 3 lb/ft³, 4 lb/in³.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktının yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı.
